questions.question: Why is the hypervisor considered a high-value target for attackers? (2 marks)
expectedPoints: It has the highest level of privilege in a virtualized system.
A compromise can lead to a breach of all guest VMs on the host, breaking fundamental isolation.

questions.question: Describe a comprehensive set of best practices for securing a library of VM templates (golden images) in an enterprise cloud environment. (5 marks)
expectedPoints: Source from trusted, official providers only.
Harden and patch images before adding to the library (disable unused services, apply latest updates).
Store images in a secure, access-controlled, and isolated repository.
Implement version control and regularly re-scan images for new vulnerabilities.
Never embed secrets (passwords, keys); use secure secrets injection at deployment.
Use immutable storage for master images to prevent modification.
